decisions.summary: Validate hook paths in copyPanopticonSettingsToWorkspace — remove broken hooks from merged workspace settings.json instead of letting Claude Code fail silently

hazards.summary: Hook commands may use relative paths or shell interpolation
hazards.mitigation: Only validate absolute file paths; skip validation for relative paths or commands with shell syntax

resumePoint.description: Both beads complete. Run full test suite, push branch, then signal completion with pan done.

sessionHistory.note: Fresh start on PAN-930. No continue file existed. Discovered issue: broken damage-control hooks path in workspace settings.json causes review timeouts.
Implemented hook path validation in copyPanopticonSettingsToWorkspace. Typecheck passes.
Added 7 unit tests for hook path validation. All pass.
